# Bellacosa Mainframe

Project:
Java no IBM Z Simulator

Purpose:
Educational simulator for IBM Mainframe developers.

Audience:
COBOL Developers
IBM Z Students
Java Developers
Mainframe Architects

Topics:
Java
IBM Z
COBOL
CICS
Db2
MQ
JCL
z/OS
